metadata.title: Bizim Qida | Nakhchivan's Leading Food Distribution Company
metadata.description: Nakhchivan's largest food distribution company within Sürkit Holding

hero.title: Delivering Food
hero.description: As Nakhchivan's largest food distribution company within Sürkit Holding, we strengthen the region's food supply chain with over 31 years of experience.

holdingStrip.text: The region's leading food supply chain Bizim Qida LLC · A {holding} subsidiary.

about.title: We Always
about.description: Bizim Qida is Sürkit Holding's food distribution subsidiary in Nakhchivan. With the most comprehensive distribution network in the region, we provide uninterrupted service to supermarkets, restaurants, hotels, and wholesale outlets.
about.value1Desc: We believe in the power of producing together. Our employees are our greatest driving force.
about.value2Desc: With an entrepreneurial spirit, we place great emphasis on creativity in all our activities.
about.value3Desc: We establish rightful relationships with all stakeholders through an honest, hardworking, and responsible approach.

boardMessage.quote: Our investments in Nakhchivan are not only for today — they are designed to add value to the future.
boardMessage.body1: As Sürkit Holding, the food distribution structure we established in Nakhchivan started with the mission of providing reliable, uninterrupted, and quality food access to the people of the region. Bizim Qida is the strongest reflection of this mission.
boardMessage.body2: With our distribution network serving 7 cities in the region, over 1,200 active customers, and more than 1,500 product varieties, we have become an indispensable part of Nakhchivan's food ecosystem. We will continue to grow this success together with our team.

management.title: The
management.description: Under the leadership of Sürkit Holding's experienced team, we are transforming the food distribution sector in Nakhchivan.

services.title: Comprehensive
services.service1Desc: Regular, reliable wholesale food supply to all business points across Nakhchivan.
services.service2Desc: Advanced cold storage and transport infrastructure for fresh products.
services.service3Desc: Importing quality food products from Turkey and international sources.
services.service4Desc: On-time delivery with modern warehouse facilities and optimized logistics network.
services.service5Desc: Route optimization and on-time delivery guarantee with our fleet of 35 vehicles.
services.service6Desc: Bulk food supply packages for hotels, restaurants, and corporate clients.

brands.title: Our Strong
brands.description: We are the authorized distributor of leading global and Turkish food brands in Nakhchivan.

distribution.title: The Region's
distribution.description: We provide uninterrupted service with our distribution network spanning 7 districts of Nakhchivan.
distribution.fleetDesc: Daily delivery capability including refrigerated vehicles across all regions.
distribution.warehouseDesc: Separate sections for dry, chilled, and frozen products.
distribution.mapHoverPrompt: Click on the map for region details

news.title: Latest
news.news1Title: New distribution center within Sürkit Holding opened in Nakhchivan
news.news3Title: Major investment in cold chain infrastructure

career.title: Join Our
career.description: Take your place in a dynamic team contributing to Nakhchivan's growth as part of the Sürkit Holding family.

apply.title: Want to
apply.description: Leverage Bizim Qida's reliable distribution network for your market, restaurant, hotel, or wholesale outlet. Fill out the application form and we'll get back to you shortly.
apply.successMessage: We will contact you as soon as possible. Thank you.

footer.description: Nakhchivan's leading food distribution company, a Sürkit Holding subsidiary.
